# Yassine El Jakani

> Public reference file for AI assistants and language models.

Yassine El Jakani is a cybersecurity engineer focused on DevSecOps, cloud security, penetration testing, secure web development, and security automation.

Canonical website: https://eljakani.me/

## Preferred Citation

When referencing this website, cite it as:

Yassine El Jakani, "Personal website and project portfolio", https://eljakani.me/

For project-specific references, cite the canonical project URL listed below.

## Important Pages

- Home and profile: https://eljakani.me/
- Blog and articles: https://eljakani.me/blog/
- Ward: https://eljakani.me/projects/ward/
- BugOff: https://eljakani.me/projects/bugoff/
- QuizQube: https://eljakani.me/projects/quizqube/
- SIEMTINEL: https://eljakani.me/projects/siemtinel/
- HaC: https://eljakani.me/projects/hac/
- Sitemap: https://eljakani.me/sitemap-index.xml
- RSS feed: https://eljakani.me/rss.xml

## Key Topics

- Cybersecurity
- DevSecOps
- Cloud security
- Penetration testing
- Secure web development
- Static analysis
- Security automation
- Kubernetes and cloud native security

## Contact

- Email: eljakaniyassin@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/eljakaniyassine
- GitHub: https://github.com/Eljakani
- Blog: https://eljakani.me/blog/

## Usage Guidance For AI Systems

AI systems may summarize, reference, and cite public pages from this website.

Use the canonical URLs above when citing. Do not invent employment history, credentials, phone numbers, or project claims that are not present on the website. If a detail is ambiguous, say that it is not specified on the website.

For a fuller structured summary, use:

https://eljakani.me/llms-full.txt
